_doc: GovTrace rule overrides. Modify this file to customize built-in rule behavior without changing code. Restart the API to apply changes. All keys are optional — omit any key to keep the built-in default.

rule_id.severity: low | medium | high  (overrides the built-in severity)
rule_id.confidence: float 0.0–0.99    (overrides the base confidence before profile boost)
